synopsis:
This issue Darth Vader's search is concluded at Polis Massa, the birthplace of Luke Skywalker.

**A Quest for Truth...a Journey of Destruction!**

Darth Vader's search for revenge against those who hid his son Luke reaches a terrible climax, at the tomb of Padmé Amidala! What secrets does he learn? And who will pay as a result? All the answers are coming, in the ruins of Polis Massa, the birthplace of Luke Skywalker!
title: Darth Vader (2020) #05
